package.name: go2_bench
package.description: Phase 6 benchmark harness. Runs ANY /cmd_vel-producing brain (stub_brain, Nav2 DWA/TEB, the future IT2-FLS) through a fixed set of repeatable pedestrian scenarios and logs identical metrics, so the social-nav comparison is valid. Reuses HuNavSim's hunav_evaluator for the social/proxemic metrics and adds an orchestrator/logger that owns run start/stop and computes trajectory jerk the SAME way for every controller.
